summary: Producer skills no longer block the main thread on N-mutation encoding. Introduced encode-batch sub-skill (shared, Haiku, subagent_safe: true) that receives N semantic observations from a producer, maps each to a field_path against the target schema, runs write-to-context.py per mutation, rebuilds the snapshot, runs finalize-mutation-batch.py, returns a structured summary. Producer skills extract semantic signals (cognitively heavy, Sonnet-grade) and ship the operator-facing synthesis without waiting on field-by-field mapping (cognitively light, Haiku-grade). snapshot-brand Step 3 + Step 6 patched. ingest-resource Step 3B patched.

changes.rationale: Sub-skill addressing the snapshot-brand and ingest-resource lag (15-50 mutations encoded sequentially in main thread, 60-120s blocking). Mechanical mapper: takes observations classified by semantic_kind, maps to field_path via canonical table, runs write-to-context.py per observation, rebuilds snapshot, runs finalize-mutation-batch.py, returns JSON summary. Haiku-grade because the cognitive work (extraction, classification) is done upstream by the producer.

Step 3 (spec.json generation) and Step 6 (profile.json base) now delegate the N-mutation encoding to encode-batch via Task tool. Producer extracts observations from the scrape + Q1-Q4 answers, ships the payload, continues to Step 7 synthesis without blocking.
Encoding via encode-batch when batch >5 mutations. Inline write-to-context.py still acceptable for ≤5 mutations (sub-agent overhead not worth it for small batches).

operator_impact: Snapshot-brand and ingest-resource feel ~5-10x faster on the operator side. The synthesis arrives in 5-15s instead of 60-120s. Encoding runs in background as a Haiku sub-agent. Operator sees a one-line footnote (e.g. '27 mutations encoded in background, all green') instead of watching the agent grind through fields one at a time. If finalize-mutation-batch flags a blocking issue, producer surfaces it before close.

performance_target.before: snapshot-brand 25-mutation run: ~60-120s in main thread, operator waits on field-by-field encoding
performance_target.after: snapshot-brand 25-mutation run: 5-15s synthesis on operator side, encoding parallel in Haiku sub-agent
performance_target.measurement_method: TBD via observation on first real test run on phantomos-test workspace
